ns3:icsproject.name: project_1
ns3:icsproject.ns2:projectDescription: Receives B2B messages via FTP from Avinsh corp

note.name: See-Integration-Properties
note.description: Click on "Schedule" action, then on the pop-up hamburger menu, and select "Edit Integration Properties". Set the correct Inbound Directory path and other parameters.

note.name: Inbound-Functional-Ack
note.description: No further processing is needed for inbound functional acks. The ack will be parsed, persisted and correlated with the original outbound message automatically. You can view it under B2B Tracking > Business messages view.
